news.t: Horizon Kinetics Launches the Horizon Kinetics SPAC Active ETF (SPAQ) and the Horizon Kinetics Medical ETF (MEDX)

holdings.infoBox: SPAQ is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Horizon Kinetics SPAC Active ETF (SPAQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to globally listed, pre-combination special purpose acquisition companies (SPACs) of any capitalization. SPAQ was launched on Jan 27, 2023 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: Horizon Kinetics Launches the Horizon Kinetics SPAC Active ETF (SPAQ) and the Horizon Kinetics Medical ETF (MEDX)
data.text: NEW YORK, NY / ACCESSWIRE / January 30, 2023 / Horizon Kinetics LLC today launched the Horizon Kinetics SPAC Active ETF (NASDAQ:SPAQ) and the Horizon Kinetics Medical ETF (NASDAQ:MEDX). SPAQ was conve...
